title: Decadent Irish Baked Bowl
description: A rich and creamy Irish-inspired dessert in a crispy baked bowl.
instructions: Whisk flour, baking powder, and salt in a medium bowl.
Add sugar, whiskey, and melted butter to the dry ingredients; mix until a dough forms.
Roll out dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch (6 mm).
Cut out a circle of dough slightly larger than the bowl.
Place dough circle over the bowl, pressing edges to seal.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
While the crust is baking, mix crumbled Epoisses and heavy cream in a small bowl.
Once the crust is ready, fill with the Epoisses mixture.
Bake for an additional 5-7 minutes, or until the filling is heated through.
Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving.
